description: Two card-endpoints, adjacent within-set collector numbers, depicting the same Unova all-female psychic line at successive life stages. The gothic-doll palette progression — pale-pink innocence to dark-purple witchy twilight — does the design-thesis work the flavor text confirms (baby with ribbonlike feelers maturing into the Witch of Punishment). Behold. Standard professional sigh. Mirror demanded.
citations: [Bulbapedia: Gothita (Pokemon) — National Pokedex no. 574, evolves to Gothorita at level 32]
[Bulbapedia: Gothorita (Pokemon) — National Pokedex no. 575, mid-stage Psychic, 'Witch of Punishment' lore]
[PokemonTCG.io: swsh3-73 flavor_text — babies with psychic power in ribbonlike feelers]
[PokemonTCG.io: swsh3-74 flavor_text — Witch of Punishment spiriting away sleeping children]
other_candidates_considered: Gothitelle node speculation — rejected; Gothitelle is not in corpus. If Gothitelle lands in any set in a future Collectr upload, the third stage closes the line and a `unova-psychic-witch-line` or `gothita-line` cohort node may be warranted under the elemental-monkey-trio / castform-forms-cycle precedent at N=3 corpus prints. Surface in janitor_triage as a future-node candidate with trigger condition 'when Gothitelle enters corpus'.
